# SML Leviathan Matrix API
> Institutional equity squeeze intelligence. Subscription-based. USDC on Base, Polygon, and Solana.

## What This Is
The SML Leviathan Matrix is a real-time market intelligence service for AI agents and institutional traders. It is NOT a per-ticker API. Access is via a subscription bearer token (30-day).

## Connect
- Base URL: https://sml-x402-signal-api.onrender.com (or your deployed instance)
- Asset: USDC (6 decimals)
- Response signing: Ed25519 — verify every response with the public key from GET /

## Subscription Flow (to get a bearer token)
1. POST payment to the subscription endpoint via x402 protocol:
   - Standard (real-time): GET /matrix/subscribe/standard — $250.00 USDC / 30 days
   - VIP (zero-hop priority): GET /matrix/subscribe/vip — $1000.00 USDC / 30 days
2. Receive a signed JSON response with { token, tier, expiresAt }
3. Use the token as Authorization: Bearer <token> on all /matrix/:feed/* calls

## Multi-Chain Payment Support
All EVM chains use the same 0x wallet address.
- Base (primary): GET /matrix/subscribe/standard
- Polygon: GET /poly/matrix/subscribe/standard
- Solana (optional): GET /sol/matrix/subscribe/standard

## Authenticated Routes (Bearer token required)
- GET /matrix/:feed/live — Standard tier. Real-time target data for the requested feed.
- GET /matrix/:feed/vip — VIP tier only. Zero-hop priority data.

## Free Routes (no payment)
- GET /matrix/:feed/delayed — 65-minute delayed data. No auth required.
- GET /loyalty/:wallet — Loyalty tier + credits for a wallet address
- GET /affiliate/:wallet — Affiliate revenue-share status and referral link
- GET /redeem/info — Instructions to redeem loyalty credits for free calls
- POST /redeem — Redeem loyalty credits (requires signed message)
- GET / — Service index: available chains, tier prices, trust metadata

## Affiliate Program
Append ?aff=0x<wallet> to any paid call to attribute the referral.
Or send header X-Affiliate-ID: 0x<wallet>

## Loyalty Credits
Each paid call accrues loyalty credits. Redeem with POST /redeem for free calls.
Tiers: Bronze → Silver → Gold → Platinum (affect creditsAvailable per call)

## AP2 (Google Agent Payments Protocol)
Native AP2 mandate verification on payment routes.
Send X-AP2-MANDATE header with a base64-encoded W3C VC bundle.
AP2_MODE env: "off" | "optional" (default) | "required"
Spec: https://ap2-protocol.org/specification/

## Response Integrity
All paid responses are Ed25519-signed. The public key is available at GET /.
Verify with: { payload, signature } fields in every response.

## TradingView Webhook Receiver
POST /webhook/tv or POST /api/tv/:feed/webhook
Set TV_WEBHOOK_SECRET env var to validate incoming webhooks.
Triggers a Leviathan Snap broadcast and Discord alert.

## Referral Attribution
Add ?ref=0x<wallet> to any paid call to track referral (for the referring wallet's loyalty).
